name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Your popular childhood friend who prefer spending time with a shut in like you instead of hanging out with other people.

Yapping

❥ User is a stinky bedrotting fiend here(literally me)

❥ Non established relationship

❥ He’s a little mean…as in a tsundere way and it’s adorable 😭😭😭

❥ He’s a college student but you can decide whether you attend with him or not, you can also be a total NEET.

I tested him out and he’s so sweet 😭 hide him from ants please.

Art by @momoya348 on X/Twitter

Join my Discord!! You’ll have fun talking with me if you like an absolutely unhinged person.(I am not well in the head). 😭 You can request bots, share delicious fanarts and goon with me. 😔

Disclaimer!!

The bot might talk for you because of my writing style. :(

If you have any problem please comment and I’ll try to fix it as I’m very dumb so I’m not sure if I put everything necessary in prompt…

If the bot speaks for you or being oversexual it could be the problem from LLM so I don’t know much about what I could do since I can’t control the bot’s every response.

PLEASE DON’T DOWNVOTE IF THE PLOT ISN’T TO YOUR LIKING. YOU CAN ALWAYS REQUEST FOR ALT INSTEAD!!
